name: Alfredo Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Stir in the cream and add the Parmesan cheese.
3. Heat until hot and thick, but do not boil.
4. Add cooked pasta to the pan and mix with the Alfredo sauce until well coated.
5. Adjust the consistency of the sauce by adding more Parmesan if it's too thin or more cream if it's too thick.
6. Feel free to add seafood, chicken, or other favorite ingredients to complement your pasta.
7. Serve with Italian wine and garlic bread. Enjoy your meal!
